title: stelis avirostris
intro: Stelis avirostris is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis avirostris include relief from coughs, congestion, and other respiratory symptoms, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Stelis avirostris can be consumed as tea, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
